title: rubus macrostachys subsp. rubellus
intro: Rubus macrostachys subsp. rubellus, also known as red-stemmed dewberry, is a subspecies of the Rubus macrostachys plant, a type of raspberry native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-bacterial agent. The health benefits of Rubus macrostachys subsp. rubellus include its potential to aid in the treatment of urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. The plant can be prepared using various herbal methods, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote health and wellness.
